title: Dashboard
invariants_acknowledged: page.tsx ALREADY EXISTS (PG-129) — PG-058 does NOT create a new page, so the page-doc-cochange (gotcha #9) cascade does NOT apply; no PAGE_MAP/sitemap/registry edits are owed.

kpi-calculator.ts holds ONLY pure presentation/derivation math (delta %, trend, ticket urgency, stage %, bar height, GBP format). Business rules (winRate, conversionRate, yoyChange) stay server-authoritative per ADR-016; they are NOT duplicated client-side.

Money is mixed-typed on the wire: analytics.getOverview returns revenue as number; opportunity.getPipeline returns totalValue/totalPipelineValue as Prisma Decimal STRINGS. The calculator coerces via toFiniteNumber and never does arithmetic on raw strings.

Null/undefined/zero-denominator KPIs resolve to 0 or a documented safe sentinel (never Infinity/NaN/placeholder string) per prd-core-crm.md; widgets show a pending '...' rather than a fake 0/£0 when a query is disabled or has no data yet (codex no-fake-KPI rule).

Real-time polling uses one shared DASHBOARD_REFETCH_INTERVAL_MS (60s; DealsWon 5x), matching the global React Query staleTime; React Query dedupes identical query keys so polling does not amplify requests (avoids the getStatus refetch-storm).
A single semantic <output> live region conveys the auto-refresh cadence; KPI cards are NOT aria-live (would spam screen readers each poll) per WCAG 4.1.3.

Lighthouse ≥90 is verified on the AUTHENTICATED /dashboard (perf 97 / a11y 90); the unauthenticated base-recipe measurement (74) is a redirect artifact and is NOT representative — see artifacts/lighthouse/PG-058/SUMMARY.md.

PipelineSummary stage % uses the sum of DISPLAYED (open) stages as the denominator, not the API totalPipelineValue (which includes closed stages) — a correctness fix flagged by both the domain-expert and codex.
Pipeline stage bars are decorative (no progressbar role): the value is already in the adjacent '£X (N Deals)' text and the repo sonar-guard (jsx-a11y/prefer-tag-over-role) forbids role=progressbar.
